steps.t: Lóthinn is in the cellar of Thorin's Hall, selling various healing goods and potions that improve morale. You should see if Lóthinn has any sugared ho…
Gamall the cook is in the Maker's Hall, inside of Thorin's Hall. You should speak with Gamall to see if he might be able to give you the sugared honey…
Heikki Goldwatcher is in the main Hall of Thorin's Hall. You should speak with Heikki Goldwatcher, for he was the one that re-bought the sugared honey…
Dwalin is in Thorin's Hall, standing at the end of the Hall. You should see if Dwalin still has the sugared honeysuckle candies, given to him by a dwa…
Laufar is in the cellar of Thorin's Hall, standing with Óli. You should bring the sugared honeysuckle to Laufar as a gesture of reparation for your cr…
